zoom.selectRegion: Select a zoom region to adjust

speed.selectRegion: Select a speed region to adjust

effects.title: Video Effects
effects.webcamFootageDescription: No webcam footage linked to this video

crop.title: Crop Video
crop.instruction: Drag on each side to adjust the crop area

background.title: Background
background.uploadError: Please upload a JPG or JPEG image file.
background.uploadErrorDescription: Please upload a JPG or JPEG image file.

preferences.title: Settings
preferences.subtitle: Manage app-wide preferences for recording, editor shortcuts, and privacy-related behavior.
preferences.savedAutomatically: Changes save automatically unless a dialog says otherwise.
preferences.generalDescription: Choose the default language and recording countdown.
preferences.languageDescription: Applies to newly opened windows right away.
preferences.countdownDescription: Set the delay before ScreenCraft starts capturing.
preferences.recordingsDescription: Choose where new recordings are stored and open the current folder.
preferences.hudDescription: Control how the floating HUD behaves during capture.
preferences.hideHudFromCaptureDescription: Keep the floating control HUD out of your captured video when supported by the platform.
preferences.shortcutsDescription: Review your current editor shortcuts or customize them.
preferences.permissionsDescription: ScreenCraft uses macOS privacy permissions for screen capture and cursor tracking.
preferences.screenRecordingPermissionDescription: Required to capture your screen contents on macOS.
preferences.accessibilityPermissionDescription: Required for reliable cursor tracking and interaction capture on macOS.
preferences.permissionRestartHint: Some macOS permission changes require quitting and reopening ScreenCraft.
